name: Ridley Corporation Limited
analysis: RIC's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 13% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.3× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$2.7800, stop A$2.7076, target A$2.9971 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
